utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation (with flight details and costs), accommodation (with hotel selection and costs), activities (with selected activities and costs), additional_services (with any extra services and costs), and total_budget (complete cost breakdown). In the final package, all 7 items appear. Each has details and costs. Destination (Italy, Rome Fiumicino) is fully specified. Travel_dates (2024-08-10 to 2024-08-14) are specific. Transportation includes flight details and cost (€280). Accommodation includes hotel name and cost (€450). Activities include a list and cost (€380). Additional_services includes dining details and cost (€500). Total_budget (€1610) is provided. All items are present and fully specified.
